stories.headline: Ebola outbreak in DR Congo: More die as WHO warns that numbers will rise further
stories.description: In its latest update, the World Health Organization says there have now been 139 suspected deaths and 600 cases.

stories.headline: Why are nearly 50,000 Samsung workers about to strike in South Korea?
stories.description: Workers’ union says protest over bonuses will continue for 18 days.

stories.headline: Trump critic Massie defeated: Takeaways from US primary election results
stories.description: Here are the key takeaways from Tuesday’s US primaries in Alabama, Georgia, Idaho, Kentucky, Oregon and Pennsylvania.

stories.headline: Philippines top court rejects bid to block arrest of senator wanted by ICC
stories.description: Senator dela Rosa, whose whereabouts are ⁠unknown, is wanted by the ICC for his role in Duterte’s bloody ‘war on drugs’.

stories.headline: US and Israel planned to install Ahmadinejad as Iranian leader, NYT says
stories.description: The ‘audacious plan’ quickly unravelled and Ahmadinejad’s whereabouts are unknown, US officials told the newspaper
